turns.text: hi
Hello! Welcome to Paradise Restaurant. How can I help you today?
I want to order biryani
Great choice! We have Hyderabadi Biryani ₹280 and Veg Biryani ₹220. Would you like either of these?
the veg one please
Added Veg Biryani to your order. Anything else? Drinks, sides, or desserts?
no that's all
Your Veg Biryani order is confirmed! Delivery in 35 mins. Track it anytime. Thank you!
book a room for tomorrow
I can help with room booking. What type of room do you need? We have Standard ₹2500, Deluxe ₹4000, Suite ₹6500.
deluxe for 2 nights
Deluxe Room for 2 nights = ₹8000 + taxes. Check-in tomorrow. Confirm booking?
yes please
Booking confirmed! Deluxe Room, 2 nights. Check-in date, parking info sent. See you soon!
can I get late checkout
Late checkout ₹500 extra. Want to add it?
no that's fine
No late checkout added. You have standard 11am checkout. Enjoy your stay!
exchange my shirt size M to L
I can help with exchange. Was this purchased in store or online?
online
For online exchanges, share order ID. We offer free pickup or drop at store.
order #12345
Found order #12345. Size M Blue Shirt. Exchange to L confirmed. Pickup scheduled tomorrow 2-5pm. Ready in 3-5 days.
food is cold
Sorry for cold food! Order #123. Refund or reorder?
refund
₹250 refund initiated. 5-7 business days to your original payment method.
book haircut for tomorrow 4pm
Haircut with Rahul at 4pm tomorrow. ₹300. Confirm?
can I get vegan products
Yes! We use Aveda vegan products. Noted for your appointment.
confirm booking
Booked! Haircut 4pm tomorrow with vegan products. See you then!
order medicines for diabetes
For diabetic medicines, I need prescription upload. Can you share?
uploaded already for previous order
Found your prescription on file. Which diabetic medicines do you need?
Metformin 500mg 3 strips
Metformin 500mg x3 = ₹450. Delivery tomorrow by 10am. Confirm?
yes
Ordered! Delivery scheduled. Keep prescription handy for verification.
join gym
Welcome! Memberships: Monthly ₹1500, Quarterly ₹4000, Annual ₹12000. Join fee ₹500 one-time. Which plan?
annual plan
Annual plan ₹12000 + ₹500 join fee = ₹12500. Start date?
start today
Confirmed! Annual membership from today. WiFi password: GymFit2024. Welcome aboard!
find biryani places nearby
Found 3 biryani places: Paradise ₹280, Hyderabad House ₹250, Biryani Blues ₹320. Closest: Paradise 1.2km away.
order from Paradise
Paradise menu loaded. What would you like?
full biryani family pack
Family Biryani Pack ₹650 (serves 4). Add anything else?
that's it
Order confirmed! Paradise Family Pack ₹650. Delivery in 40 mins. Enjoy!
book 2 tickets for comedy show saturday
Comedy Night Saturday 8pm. ₹599 per ticket. 2 tickets = ₹1198. Book?
yes
Tickets booked! QR codes sent. Show entry 7pm doors open. Enjoy the show!
book cab to airport 6am tomorrow
Cab to airport tomorrow 6am. Sedan ₹450, SUV ₹650. Which?
sedan
Sedan booked. Driver details at 5:45am. Airport drop ₹450. Confirm?
yes pay by UPI
Booking confirmed! UPI payment. Driver arriving 5:45am. Safe travels!

positive: Great to hear! Anything else I can help with?
Thanks for your order! Delivery details sent.
Order confirmed! Track anytime. Thank you!
negative: I'm sorry about your experience. Let me make it right.
I understand your frustration. Here's what I can do: [options]
Apologies for the inconvenience. Resolving now.
Let me escalate this to our team immediately.
Sorry for the trouble. Compensation options available.
neutral: Understood. Let me check that for you.
I see. Here's what I found.
Understood. Is there anything else you need?
confused: I want to make sure I understand. Did you mean [rephrase]?
I can help with that. Could you clarify [question]?
Not sure I got that. Try saying it differently?
I can help with orders, bookings, and more. What would you like?

fallback_responses: I'm not sure I understand. Try: 'order food', 'book table', 'track order', or 'contact support'.
I can help with orders, bookings, complaints, and general questions. What do you need?
Let me connect you to support for this. One moment.
I can help with food orders, table reservations, delivery tracking, and more. How can I help?
Sorry, I didn't get that. Try: 'order [item]' or 'book [service]'.

edge_cases.response: I'm not sure I understood. Try 'order food', 'book table', or 'help'.
To cancel, say 'cancel my order' and I'll help.
I see you're writing in Chinese. I currently support English. Please try again in English or type 'help' for options.

edge_cases.input: WHAT THE HELL IS WRONG WITH YOUR SERVICE
edge_cases.response: I apologize for the frustration. Let me help right away. What happened?
I'm so sorry to hear that. Let me help. What happened?
I understand. How can I help make things better?
Got it! What would you like to order?
Still here! Say 'help' for options or 'order [item] to place an order.
